nodes.name: Nicator
nodes.summary: Nicator（Nicator）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Western nicator、Eastern nicator、Yellow-throated nicator。

nodes.name: Western nicator
nodes.summary: The western nicator (Nicator chloris) is a species of songbird in the family Nicatoridae. Description It is very similar to the eastern nicator, but the sides of the face and crown are olive green. It is best identified by its range and some of its vocalizations. Range It is mainly native to the African tropical rainforest. Habitat It inhabits subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical swamps. It prefers well-established secondary growth forest from 700 to 1,850 metres (2,300 to 6,070 ft). References External links Media related to Nicator chloris at Wikimedia Commons
